summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Axovion.io AI automation agency website. Backend: 100% pass rate (28/28 endpoints). Frontend: All 9 public pages + admin dashboard fully functional. AI features (Groq-powered audit reports + chatbot) working correctly. One minor task creation bug fixed. One cosmetic chatbot overlay issue identified (non-blocking).

fixed_bugs.issue: Task creation returned 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Added serialize_doc() helper to exclude _id field before returning response

expected_behaviors.impact: Emails don't send but functionality doesn't break - email logs are created
Vapi calls fail but CallLog entries are created with error message
expected_behaviors.note: EXPECTED per requirements - user provided public key instead of private server key

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts pointer events, preventing normal click
ui_bugs.workaround: Works with force=True in Playwright or by scrolling page
ui_bugs.impact: Minor cosmetic issue - chatbot still accessible to users

passed_tests: Backend health endpoints (/api, /api/health)
Admin authentication (login with admin@axovion.io)
AI Audit submission → report generation (Groq Llama 3.3 70B, 15-30s)
AI Chatbot messaging (Groq-powered, FAQ chips + free text)
Contact form submission
Newsletter signup on blog page
Booking creation
Admin dashboard stats and recent audits
Admin audits list with filters (status, lead score)
Admin audit detail page with status updates
Admin bookings list and status updates
Admin tasks CRUD operations
Admin chats list
Admin analytics (dashboard, funnel, timeseries, sources)
Admin emails logs
Admin calls logs and health check
Admin settings management
All 9 public pages render without errors (Home, Services, About, Team, Blog, Contact, Results, Audit, Audit-Report)
Hero section with Aurora background animation
Services bento grid with hover states (cyan glow border)
ROI calculator on audit report page (interactive sliders)
Retell AI calling integration (2 agents available)
Lead scoring (hot/warm/cold based on revenue + budget)
JWT-based admin authentication
MongoDB data persistence
CORS configuration
Environment variable usage (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL)
All backend routes with /api prefix (Kubernetes ingress compatible)
